note: These are estimated configurable costs. Actual hospital finance data is required for production.

add_er_certified_nurse.name: Add 1 ER-certified nurse
add_er_certified_nurse.cost_assumption_source: Hospital Labor Costing Model - ER Specialty Rate
add_er_certified_nurse.cost_note: Assumes standard emergency nurse base rate of $55/hr over a 12-hour shift.

activate_float_pool.name: Activate float pool
activate_float_pool.cost_note: Assumes a flat float pool shift activation incentive premium.

add_triage_support.name: Arrival surge / triage support
add_triage_support.cost_note: Assumes triage support nurse rate of $50/hr for 12 hours.

waiting_room_monitoring.name: Waiting room monitoring
waiting_room_monitoring.cost_note: Assumes a junior nurse or patient advocate at $35/hr for 12 hours.

open_fast_track_lane.name: Open fast-track lane
open_fast_track_lane.cost_note: Assumes standard mid-level provider staffing flat cost per shift.

bed_flow_escalation.name: Escalate inpatient bed management
bed_flow_escalation.cost_note: Utilizes existing shift coordinators and inpatient beds, hence zero direct added cost.

fatigue_safe_replacement.name: Fatigue-safe replacement
fatigue_safe_replacement.cost_note: Includes a $100 coordinator callback fee plus premium safety rate of $60/hr.
